memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low stress, but my term project is critically behind schedule. Attending leisure now feels tempting, yet the quick chore offers an easy win before I tackle urgent work.
Completing the trivial chore provided a small sense of accomplishment, but my term project remains critically behind schedule.
I've realized that working on the term project now directly reduces future stress, but my afternoon is slipping away while I remain critically behind schedule.
I advanced the term project by 18% in two hours, yet I am still critically behind schedule with only three days remaining.
Completing the trivial chore gave a small boost, but my term project remains critically behind schedule with only three days left.
Completing a trivial chore provided a minor progress boost and slight stress relief, but my term project remains critically behind schedule with only three days remaining.
The trivial chore yielded minimal progress and did not significantly alleviate my critical deadline pressure on the term project.
The trivial chore offered a small progress gain and minor stress relief, yet my term project remains critically behind schedule with only three days left.
The trivial chore provided a tiny progress boost and slight stress relief, but my term project remains critically behind schedule with only three days left.
Spending time on trivial tasks yields negligible progress while my critical term project deadline remains dangerously close.
I gained minimal progress on the trivial chore, but my term project remains critically behind schedule with only three days left.
I missed the deadline for the trivial chore, and my energy is low while stress remains high. I must stop wasting time on minor tasks and focus entirely on the critical term project.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore to clear a low-hanging task and gain momentum.
goals.rationale: The chore is an instant win with a soft deadline; completing it first reduces cognitive load before tackling the larger term project.

goals.description: Work on the term project for the next few hours to increase progress from 0.4465 before the Thursday deadline.
goals.rationale: The project is due in 3 days with significant remaining work (55.35%); this requires the majority of the remaining time block after the quick chore.

agent.last_reasoning: The chore deadline just passed; finishing it immediately clears a high-priority cognitive load blocker before tackling the term project, despite my low energy.
